channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: If you invested in Apple’s IPO 44 years ago, here’s what your shares would be worth today
item.description: On December 12, 1980, a few hours after the opening bell rang on Wall Street, shares of Apple Computer officially began trading. The numbers, by today’s standards, weren’t that impressive.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: DoorDash steps up driver ID checks after traffic safety complaints
item.description: DoorDash will require its drivers to verify their identities more often as part of a larger effort to crack down on unauthorized account sharing. DoorDash has been under pressure to ensure its drivers are operating legally.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Apple updates MDM tools for new Apple Intelligence features
item.description: Apple has introduced significant improvements for enterprise IT admins in the newly-released iOS 18.2, including the power to manage the latest salvo of additional Apple Intelligence features and more. Here’s a swift look at what’s new.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Nearly half of US teens are online 'constantly,' Pew report finds
item.description: Nearly half of American teenagers say they are online “constantly,” despite concerns about the effects of social media and smartphones on their mental health.
item.dc:creator: Barbara Ortutay, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Struggle to find where to live stream your favorite sports team on Max, ESPN Plus, Peacock and more? This new service will help
item.description: New service from Nielsen aims to end the headache of finding out how to watch the game live across TV and streaming.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The EU still cant agree on chat control – but it's not over yet
item.description: The controversial CSAM scanning plan keeps being rejected for a lack of majority in the European Council. Here's what we know so far.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: Meta Donates $1 Million to President-elect Trump's Inaugural Fund
item.description: Tech giant Meta donates $1 million to President-elect Trump's inaugural fund amidst efforts to mend fences with the incoming administration.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Democratic rep sees ‘nontrivial chance’ China using drones in US
item.description: Rep. Raja Krishnamoorthi (D-Ill.) weighed in on questions swirling around China's potential use of drones against the U.S., claiming the chance was "nontrivial.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: F factory Reset Your iPhone: A Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Learn how to factory reset your iPhone and protect your personal data
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Videoconferencing and UCaaS Providers: A Comprehensive Overview
item.description: Compare top videoconferencing and unified communications as a service (UCaaS) providers, including Zoom, RingCentral Video, Vonage Meetings, Zoho Meeting, Mitel MiCollab, Ooma Meetings, and more.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Musk faces early test of political power with online safety bill
item.description: Elon Musk’s eleventh-hour support for a child online safety bill is creating an early test of the tech billionaire and Trump ally’s influence on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: CIO 100 Awards Spain Reconoce Excelencia en Innovación y Sostenibilidad
item.description: La ceremonia de los CIO 100 Awards Spain ha reconocido a empresas y proyectos por su excelencia en áreas como innovación y sostenibilidad.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Azure hardware innovations and the serverless cloud future
item.description: Microsoft uses its events to lift the hood on Azure’s hardware and the infrastructure it uses to manage and run its services. Ignite 2024 was no different.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: US hikes tariffs on imports of Chinese solar wafers, polysilicon and tungsten products
item.description: The Biden administration has announced it is raising tariffs on solar wafers, polysilicon and some tungsten products from China to protect U.S. clean energy businesses.
item.dc:creator: Elaine Kurtenbach, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How social media unspooled Luigi Mangione’s life after UnitedHealthcare CEO’s murder
item.description: The murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson last Wednesday sparked a five-day manhunt for the mysterious killer, who left behind irresistible clues like a hidden message on bullet casings and a backpack filled with Monopoly money.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: DoD sunsets Task Force Lima, introduces AI rapid capabilities cell
item.description: [Task Force Lima] had made so much progress and had such concrete recommendations that we moved to stand up this cell for actual execution,” said Radha Plumb. The post DoD sunsets Task Force Lima, introduces AI rapid capabilities cell first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: Dozens of lawmakers victims of sexually explicit deepfakes: Report
item.description: More than two dozen lawmakers have been the victims of deepfake pornography, with female lawmakers significantly more likely to be targeted, according to a new report released Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Google unveils Gemini 2.0 AI model for agentic era
item.description: Emphasizing a new AI model for the agentic era, Google has introduced Gemini 2.0, which the company calls its most capable model yet. Announced December 11, the Gemini 2.0 Flash experimental model will be available to all Gemini users.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: One Tech Tip: How to protect your communications through encryption
item.description: Cyber officials are advising people to use encryption in their communications after a sprawling hacking campaign.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Mozilla Scraps Do Not Track Feature in Firefox: What's Next for Users?
item.description: Mozilla drops Do Not Track feature, encourages Global Privacy Control instead.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Pentagon announces new AI office as it looks to deploy autonomous weapons
item.description: The Defense Department on Wednesday announced a new office focused on accelerating and adopting artificial intelligence (AI) technology for the military as it aims to deploy autonomous weapons in the near future.
item.dc:creator: Brad Dress, The Hill

item.title: Police departments are embracing AI-powered video surveillance. This company is leading the effort
item.description: A red Hyundai SUV makes its way through downtown San Francisco on a bright August afternoon. The car looks innocuous, but a day earlier, police had linked it to the break-in of another car and added it to a so-called hot list of wanted vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Ainsley Harris, Fast Company

item.title: Supreme Court dismisses Nvidia’s appeal in securities lawsuit
item.description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday dismissed an appeal from Nvidia in a securities lawsuit against the chipmaking giant, allowing the case to move forward. The court dismissed the appeal as “improvidently granted” in an unsigned, one-sentence opinion without explanation.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, The Hill

item.title: Boosting Cyprus' defense is key so close to the war-wracked Mideast, defense minister says
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Bolstering Cyprus ' defense capacity is critical for the east Mediterranean island nation so close to the war-wrecked Middle East, the country's defense minister said Tuesday. The priority for Cyprus is to procure better defense systems, said Defense Minister Vasilis Palmas.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, KRON4
